reason: TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md establishes full bidirectional traceability. All 21 ACs from SRS.md §5 (FR-01..FR-03 + NFR-01..NFR-03) have one row each in §3 with design elements + test IDs, all marked COVERED. §4 backward link mirrors forward (21/21 parity). §6 sums to 21/21. §7 completeness checks C1–C10 all pass. §5 enumerates 7 cross-cutting concerns; §8 maps all 3 risks (R1/R2/R3) from SRS §8 to mitigating ACs/tests. §9 NFR-99 (none) matches SRS §7. No invention, no orphan tests, no orphan design — every design element is a sub-symbol reachable from the §2.2 module map.
